title: Eva Store interviews
wikitext:
[]: Eva Store interviews             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Apr 16, 2015 7:24 am So the Eva Store has been putting up some interviews http://route2015.evastore.jp/interview/ In the third one with Ryusuke Hikawa, starting from page 4 there seems to be some info regarding hte production of Ha and Q: http://route2015.evastore.jp/interview/03/4/ Is the anything new in there?

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Tue Apr 28, 2015 6:29 pm Here are the interviews in English A Journey to Solve the “Mystery” of Animation: Anime and tokusatsu researcher Ryusuke Hikawa http://route2015.otakumode.com/interview/03/ The Man Who Created 3,000 Evangelion Products http://route2015.otakumode.com/interview/02/ The Power of Fonts, as Shown by Evangelion http://route2015.otakumode.com/interview/01/ The font interview is interesting.
